semantic_description: The function scans an integer array a[0..n) with a for loop, keeps two scalar dynamic-programming states prev2 and prev1, and returns the Coq-defined house_robber_spec over the full input list. The input array is read-only and must be preserved. The loop may execute zero times when n is 0, in which case the initial accumulator value 0 is returned. The contract bounds n, every array element, and every prefix result to the C int range.
